text: There is a strange kind of anticipation as I walk through these halls, lit by the glow of artificial lights and the meticulous order of modern design. The glass, the neon, the stark geometry—all of it feels deliberate, as if I am entering a space where knowledge is both created and displayed. My thoughts teeter between curiosity and detachment, sensing both the energy of research and the coldness of its containment. Each step draws me closer to the heart of inquiry, and I feel my role as an observer intensify.
